name: revit_create_stairs_automation
description: Creates stairs using one of five predefined automation configurations (straight, curved, or standard multi-run).

configuration_index.description: Stairs config index (0 straight, 1 curved, 2 curved two-level, 3 standard one-level, 4 standard multi-level)

top_level_name.description: Top level name (sample default Level 2 or Level 3)

notes: StairsAutomationUtility.GenerateStairs contains creation logic; pass explicit config index instead of cycling.
